advanced_modeling.responsibility: Applies turnout/persuasion lift curves to precincts
Runs deterministic and Monte Carlo scenario projections

archive.responsibility: Ingests historical election data into normalized archive
Identifies similar historical elections for calibration
Builds precinct behavioral profiles from historical data
Trains Random Forest turnout prediction model
Computes long-term turnout/support trends per precinct

audit.responsibility: Validates pipeline output artifacts for integrity

auth.responsibility: Manages user authentication and role-based permissions

calibration.responsibility: Calibrates model outputs against observed results

state.responsibility: Builds and persists the canonical campaign state store
Defines and validates campaign state schema

strategy.responsibility: Generates full strategy recommendations and targeting

voters.responsibility: Scores voter persuadability using modeled features
Scores voter likelihood to turn out
Parses and normalizes raw voter file data

war_room.responsibility: Loads live field/volunteer runtime data for war room

expected_content: Historical election data folders per state/county/year
Polling, demographics, registration, ballot return data
Field activity, budget, volunteer schedule data

scenarios.name: Optimistic Turnout (+10%)
scenarios.description: Assumes 10% higher turnout overall across all precincts.

scenarios.name: Pessimistic Turnout (-15%)
scenarios.description: Assumes a 15% drop in turnout due to weather or suppression.

scenarios.name: Incremental Persuasion (+2%)
scenarios.description: Assumes field efforts yield a 2% lift in support among undecideds.

scenarios.name: Strong Field Success (+5%)
scenarios.description: Assumes highly effective mobilization and persuasion (+5% support, +5% turnout).
